rewritten_query: Please check whether I will need to bring an umbrella in Shanghai tomorrow morning.
Can you tell me if I should carry an umbrella in Shanghai tomorrow morning?
Let me know whether an umbrella is necessary in Shanghai tomorrow morning.
Please tell me the expected temperature in Guangzhou at noon tomorrow.
What temperature is forecast for Guangzhou at noon tomorrow?
Could you share the expected noon temperature in Guangzhou for tomorrow?
Please find and book a flight from Hong Kong to Singapore for next Friday.
Can you book me a flight from Hong Kong to Singapore for next Friday?
Help me locate and reserve a flight from Hong Kong to Singapore for next Friday.
Please plan a two-night hotel stay near Tokyo Station.
Can you arrange a hotel stay for two nights near Tokyo Station?
Help me plan accommodation near Tokyo Station for two nights.
Please work out 245 times 37.
Can you calculate 245 multiplied by 37?
Compute the product of 245 and 37.
Please compute a 15 percent tip on a 68 dollar bill.
Can you calculate the 15 percent tip for a 68 dollar bill?
Work out how much a 15 percent tip would be on a 68 dollar bill.
Please summarize this meeting note into three bullets.
Can you turn this meeting note into three bullet points?
Summarize this meeting note as three bullets.
Please rewrite this email so it sounds more polite and concise.
Can you make this email more polite and concise?
Rewrite this email in a more polite and concise way.
Please check Tesla's closing stock price from yesterday.
Can you look up Tesla's closing stock price from yesterday?
Tell me Tesla's closing stock price for yesterday.
Please look up the latest Bitcoin price.
Can you check the latest price of Bitcoin?
Tell me the most recent Bitcoin price.
Please set an alarm for 7 am tomorrow.
Can you schedule an alarm for 7 am tomorrow?
Set up an alarm for 7 am tomorrow.
Please move my dentist appointment to next Monday afternoon.
Can you reschedule my dentist appointment for next Monday afternoon?
Help me shift my dentist appointment to next Monday afternoon.
Please tell me whether it will rain in Beijing this weekend.
Can you check if rain is expected in Beijing this weekend?
Let me know if Beijing will get rain this weekend.
Please find a cheap train ticket to Guangzhou for Saturday.
Can you look for an inexpensive train ticket to Guangzhou for Saturday?
Help me find a low-cost train ticket to Guangzhou for Saturday.
Please convert 18 miles to kilometers.
Can you change 18 miles into kilometers?
Tell me 18 miles in kilometers.
Please extract the action items from this paragraph.
Can you pull out the action items from this paragraph?
Identify the action items in this paragraph.
Please tell me how Apple stock performed today.
Can you check Apple's stock performance today?
Let me know how Apple stock did today.
Please schedule a meeting with Alice at 3 pm next Tuesday.
Can you set up a meeting with Alice for 3 pm next Tuesday?
Arrange a meeting with Alice at 3 pm next Tuesday.
Please tell me whether I should expect hot weather in Shenzhen tonight.
Can you check if it will be hot in Shenzhen tonight?
Let me know whether Shenzhen will have hot weather tonight.
Please add 18.6 and 73.4.
Can you calculate 18.6 plus 73.4?
Work out the sum of 18.6 and 73.4.
